markdown:
# Armor of Resistance

- **Type**: GV|XDMG

You have [[resistance]] to one type of damage while you wear this armor. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly by rolling on the following table.

| d10 | Damage Type |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | [[armor_of_acid_resistance]] |
| 2 | [[armor_of_cold_resistance]] |
| 3 | [[armor_of_fire_resistance]] |
| 4 | [[armor_of_force_resistance]] |
| 5 | [[armor_of_lightning_resistance]] |
| 6 | [[armor_of_necrotic_resistance]] |
| 7 | [[armor_of_poison_resistance]] |
| 8 | [[armor_of_psychic_resistance]] |
| 9 | [[armor_of_radiant_resistance]] |
| 10 | [[armor_of_thunder_resistance]] |
